items.name: Tic Tac Toe Board
items.description: Play a quick game of Tic Tac Toe with a nearby player! (Get close to another player and click on them to start a game - they need to accept your challenge for the game to start).

items.name: Deadly Laser Vision Polar Bear Mount
items.description: Rideable polar bear that shoots deadly laser beams out of his eyes. Hop on his back and use 'W', 'A', 'S', 'D', or the arrow keys to move around. Click to shoot deadly lasers from the polar bears eyes. If hit, your opponent will take 40-70 points of damage.  Disclaimer- this is not a real polar bear. No polar bears were harmed in the making of this virtual polar bear robot. Please do not attempt to ride polar bears irl. Please do not attempt to attach lasers to real polar bears. Does not require batteries.  Is virtual.  Is subject to additional disclaimers in very small print below the bottom of this visible text. Not really though. If you meet a polar bear - please be cool and don't approach it.  This is actually good advice for pretty much any bear.

items.name: Sword of the Seven Winters
items.description: Summon the blizzard of seven winters, causing snow for you and all around you.  Lucky for you, you knew the blizzard was coming and can move quickly in the snow that slows your enemies.  Does 20 damage.

items.name: Shuriken of the Clan of the Crescent Moon
items.description: A superior man is modest in his speech, but exceeds in his actions.

items.name: Exploding Lab Table
items.description: You're a mad scientist.  You want to blow things up.  What could look more innocent than an exploding lab table?  Drop your portable lab anywhere and 10 seconds later watch everything explode!

items.name: Cymbals
items.description: Clash!  Slam these babies together to make a loud sound!  Does no damage.

items.name: Elixir of Dreams
items.description: In a dream - you're stronger and faster.  This potion makes your dream a reality. Be careful when holding this potion.  When dropped, it has a very different effect.

items.name: Personal Fighter Jets
items.description: Mini jet fighters that strike at your command! They'll circle your head until you are ready to unleash the fury!

items.name: Sorcus' Sword of Judgement
items.description: "Judge a man by his questions rather than by his answers" -Voltaire

items.name: Racing Tractor
items.description: He traded tilling fields for chasing thrills!

items.name: Sun Slayer Sword
items.description: The chosen weapon of the Sun Slayer. Each swing strikes true and swift.

items.name: The Awe Star
items.description: Awe... SNAP! As of November 13, 2009 there are exactly equal numbers of Awe Stars and Ninja Masks of Awesomeness in existence. If you combine both items, the Awe Star becomes a weapon of Ninjitsu domination!

items.name: Frosted Santa, Harbinger of Christmas Creep
items.description: The FIRST jingle announces his presence to the world. The SECOND jingle causes only chaos. The THIRD jingle offers great opportunity. The FOURTH jingle will be the last, and then, my friends, the music stops.

items.name: Taco Launcher
items.description: It's raining tacos! Not really- more like you're shooting tacos. Fire tacos at your friends and foes. If hit they will take 20 damage as they eat the taco.  Occasionally there is a very spicy taco that will turn the eater bright red!

items.name: Hard Boiled Roadster
items.description: Hop into this egg-shaped car and speed down the bunny trail!

items.name: Snow Storm Cloud
items.description: Clicking on a humanoid of any kind (yep, works on NPCs) will cause a cloud to rush from your hand to your target. It will hover above them, spin and occasionally drop snowflakes.

items.name: Land Shark Shooter
items.description: Shoots out sharks that lurk beneath the land. Aim a shark at your foe and he'll never see it coming... unless he can see through the ground.

items.name: Wood Cabin Snowglobe
items.description: Remember when you grew up in a small cabin in the snowy woods of New England? Me neither. But maybe this snowglobe will help you imagine it.

items.name: Spartan Sword and Shield
items.description: THIS IS ROBLOX!!!!!!!! Use this sword on your enemy and when they have less than 25% health - kick them into a pit of doom.

items.name: iLift
items.description: Next time someone asks - "Do you even lift?"  You can let them know exactly how much you lift... with a bar bell to the belly.

items.name: Cool Story Air Conditioner
items.description: Remember that time 4 air conditioners fell from the sky simultaneously. Cool story, bro.

items.name: Chupacabra
items.description: You've captured the mystical chupacabra and now he does your bidding.   He still disappears on occasion, but when you click, he will attack your foes.  If you click another character, the chupacabra will attack it until it dies.

items.name: PE Whistle
items.description: Use this PE Whistle to start a vicious game of dodgeball - a game where you have all the balls! Point at an opponent and they will be the target of a bunch of dodgeballs. Each hit does 34 damage.

items.name: Orbital Violin: Deep Freeze
items.description: Play a violin that summons other flaming violins to smite your foes!

items.name: ROBLOX Blimp
items.description: Celebrate good times!  Inflate your own personal ROBLOX blimp that travels around your head forever!  Well at least until you die or leave the server....

items.name: Shadow Dancer
items.description: No enemy stands a chance when you're coming at them with two shadow dancers!

items.name: Yellow Snowball
items.description: Ewww...  say no to yellow snow.

items.name: Earth's Might Staff
items.description: Summon a heavy boulder to drop on your enemies.  If you click and hold, the boulder will gain more force!

items.name: Overseer Crossbow
items.description: Click and hold to rapidly fire arrows at your foes. Hit the 'Q' key to activate the Overseer's Menacing Arrow. Once fired, a massively sized Overseer Eye will magically replace the arrow and explode into hundreds of tiny eyes, which will shoot in all directions!

items.name: Knights of the Splintered Skies: Hydrian Elixir
items.description: Over the centuries, many have wondered how the KoSS descend upon the realm in times of peril. Only but a few know, the true source of the KoSS' power. The Hydrian Elixir grants the KoSS the ability to grow wings and fly for a short period of time. Not only does the elixir give them the ability of flight, but also increases their strength twofold and the wings attack anyone that get near them!
